title: 10 Herbal Teas to Help Clear a Runny Nose
description: Hyptis suaveolens tea, also known as bush basil, is a natural remedy for runny nose. It contains compounds like eugenol and linalool, which have anti-inflammatory properties. These properties help to reduce swelling in the nasal passages, making it easier to breathe. When you drink the tea, the anti-inflammatory compounds are absorbed into your body and can help to calm down the nasal tissues, reducing the production of excess mucus.
